---
name: Challenge a record entry
about: Dispute any evidence record, forecast resolution, probe grading, precedent, or reading on the public record.
title: "Challenge: <record entry id or path>"
labels: challenge
---

**Record entry challenged** (id or URL, e.g. `cce-2026-06-30-sonnet-5-launch` or `/experiments/fcs-1-2026-07-01/`):

**The specific claim you dispute** (quote it):

**Your grounds** (counter-evidence, source problems, methodological objection — with links where possible):

**What resolution would satisfy you** (retraction, reclassification, added caveat, re-grading, precedent overturn):

---
*Challenges become record objects. The mesh must adjudicate within five
shipped cycles; an unanswered challenge past deadline visibly degrades the
entry it targets. Upheld challenges are honored in the revision log with
credit to the challenger.*
